sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 무디스 2026년 1분기 역대 최고 실적 — 조정 희석 EPS 4.33달러로 전년 대비 13% 증가

keyPoints.text: 2026년 1분기 MCO 매출은 20억 7,900만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 8% 증가, 조정 영업마진은 150bps 확대된 53.2%를 기록하며 회사 역사상 분기 최고 실적을 달성했다.
희석 EPS는 3.73달러(+8%), 조정 희석 EPS는 4.33달러(+13%)로 영업 레버리지가 매출 성장을 초과하며 수익성 개선이 두드러졌다.
잉여현금흐름은 8억 4,400만 달러(+26%)로 급증, 연간 자사주 매입 가이던스를 약 25억 달러로 상향하며 자본환원을 가속화했다.

businessChanges.text: Moody's Analytics(MA) 매출은 8% 성장, 연간반복수익(ARR)은 36억 700만 달러(+8%)로 AI 기반 의사결정 인텔리전스 수요가 견조하게 지속되고 있다.
MA 반복매출이 전체 매출의 98%를 차지하며 유기적 고정환율 기준 7% 성장, 구독 중심의 안정적 수익 구조가 강화되고 있다.
AI 도입 가속이 Moody's의 고부가가치 연결 인텔리전스 수요를 견인하고 있다고 CEO Rob Fauber가 강조했다.

financialHighlights.text: 1분기 매출 20억 7,900만 달러(YoY +8%), MCO 조정 영업마진 53.2%(전년 51.7% 대비 150bps 확대).
조정 희석 EPS 4.33달러(+13%), 일반 희석 EPS 3.73달러(+8%)로 이익 성장이 매출을 상회했다.
영업현금흐름 9억 3,900만 달러(+24%), 잉여현금흐름 8억 4,400만 달러(+26%)로 현금 창출력이 대폭 개선됐다.
1분기 자사주 매입 및 배당을 합산한 자본환원 규모는 17억 달러, 2026년 연간 자사주 매입 가이던스는 약 25억 달러로 상향됐다.

watchItems.text: 2026년 연간 MCO 매출 성장률 가이던스(고단위 한 자릿수 %)와 조정 희석 EPS 가이던스 유지 여부를 다음 실적 발표에서 재확인해야 한다.
MA 거래성 매출이 학습솔루션 매각 및 구독 전환 영향으로 54% 급감한 만큼, 다음 분기 MA 세그먼트 믹스 변화와 ARR 성장 추이를 주시할 필요가 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a1q26earningsrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document MOODY'S CORPORATION ACHIEVED RECORD RESULTS FOR FIRST QUARTER 2026 NEW YORK, NY - April 22, 2026 - Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) today announced results for the first quarter 2026 and updated select metrics within its outlook for full-year 2026 1 . “Both MIS and MA delivered strong results this quarter with sustained growth and powerful operating leverage. MIS achieved record revenues of $1.2 billion on over $2 trillion in rated issuance and delivered an adjusted operating margin of 67%. MA continued its growth momentum with 8% ARR 3 growth and 250 basis points of adjusted operating margin expansion. As AI adoption accelerates, it is driving demand for Moody’s decision-grade connected intelligence in high-stakes environments.” — Rob Fauber, President and Chief Executive Officer, Moody’s Corporation First  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $2 trillion = 2조 달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $2 = 2달러; 250 basis points = 250포인트.

revenue of $2.1 billion increased 8% from the prior-year period, and 6% on an organic constant currency 2 basis. • MCO’s operating margin was 44.3%; MCO’s Adjusted Operating Margin 2 expanded by 150 bps to 53.2%. • Diluted EPS up 8% and Adjusted Diluted EPS 2 up 13% from the prior-year period, powered by strong topline growth and operating leverage. • Operating cash flow of $939 million up 24%; Free Cash Flow 2 of $844 million up 26%. • Accelerated capital returns: $1.7 billion share repurchases and dividends in the first quarter; raised full-year share repurchase guidance to approximately $2.5 billion 1 . • Reaffirmed guidance for full-year 2026 MCO revenue growth 1 in the high-single digit percent range and Adjusted Diluted  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.1 billion = 21억 달러; $939 million = 9억 3,900만 달러; $844 million = 8억 4,400만 달러; $1.7 billion = 17억 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $2.1 = 2.1달러; $939 = 939달러; $844 = 844달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $1.7 = 1.7달러; $16.40 = 16.40달러; $17.00 = 17.00달러.

table summarizes the key financial performance measures for the first quarter of 2026. Three Months Ended March 31, Amounts in millions, except percentages and per share amounts 2026 2025 % Change MCO Revenue $ 2,079 $ 1,924 8 % MCO Operating Margin 44.3 % 44.0 % 30 bps MCO Adjusted Operating Margin 2 53.2 % 51.7 % 150 bps MCO Diluted EPS $ 3.73 $ 3.46 8 % MCO Adjusted Diluted EPS 2 $ 4.33 $ 3.83 13 % Operating Cash Flow $ 939 $ 757 24 % Free Cash Flow 2 $ 844 $ 672 26 % MA Revenue $ 926 $ 859 8 % MA Organic Constant Currency Revenue 2 $ 899 $ 845 6 % MA ARR 3 $ 3,607 $ 3,343 8 % MA Adjusted Operating  Normalized numeric aliases: $2,079 = 2,079달러; $1,924 = 1,924달러; $3.73 = 3.73달러; $3.46 = 3.46달러; $4.33 = 4.33달러; $3.83 = 3.83달러; $939 = 939달러; $757 = 757달러; $672 = 672달러; $3,607 = 3,607달러; $732 = 732달러; 1,153 million = 11억 5,300만 달러; 2,079 million = 20억 7,900만 달러; 1,924 million = 19억 2,400만 달러; 3,607 million = 36억 700만 달러; 3,343 million = 33억 4,300만 달러; 1,065 million = 10억 6,500만 달러.

regarding the assumptions used by the Company with respect to its guidance. 2 Refer to the tables at the end of this press release for reconciliations of the non-GAAP adjusted and organic constant currency measures to U.S. GAAP. 3 Refer to Table 10 at the end of this press release for the definition of and further information on the Annualized Recurring Revenue (ARR) metric. 1 SEGMENT RESULTS Moody’s Analytics (MA) • Revenue increased 8% compared to the prior-year period. Foreign currency translation favorably impacted revenue by 3%. Revenue increased by 6% on an organic constant currency 2 basis. • Recurring revenue increased 11% year-over-year, or 7% on an organic constant‑currency 2 basis, and represented 98% of total MA revenue. • Transactional revenue declined 54% year-over-year reflecting the impact of the Learning Solutions divestiture as well as MA’s ongoing shift
